rqs: What are the time and space complexities of QuickSort, MergeSort, HeapSort, Radix Sort, and TimSort compared to Bubble, Insertion, Selection, Shell, and Naive Sorts?
Which of QuickSort, MergeSort, HeapSort, Radix Sort, and TimSort show higher stability and cache efficiency in data processing and embedded systems?
In which contexts (academic journals, conference papers, open‑source repositories) are advanced sorts like TimSort or Radix Sort preferred over classic sorts for scalability?
